concerns.text: Idea explicitly asks 'how does community engagement mediate this relationship?' (research question). Spec implements community engagement as a predictor in logistic regression (FR-006) but does NOT include mediation analysis methodology. Mediation requires testing whether community engagement explains the relationship between other factors and adoption, not just including it as a covariate. This redefines the research question from mediation to simple association.

User Story 3 describes fitting logistic regression with engagement_score as predictor, but does not specify mediation analysis steps (e.g., Baron & Kenny approach, Sobel test, or modern mediation framework). The acceptance scenarios only check AUC and p-values, not mediation effects.
